response.justification: Aisha has deep technical expertise, extensive open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse projects, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML, and client-facing technical advisory — key for this role — and has only basic German, falling short of the required C1 proficiency.
strengths: Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple public tools
Proven full-stack engineering across languages, platforms, and domains
Extensive experience mentoring and conducting technical workshops
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not C1 as required
No explicit evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or requirements management experience
Lacks documented experience in technical project leadership or client advisory roles
